title: Cognitive Firewall Instruments — authoring defensive instruments against AI-mediated analytic corruption

fields.vision: An instrument design surface for turning the capstone's cognitive-firewall idea into usable checks.
fields.mechanism: It moves from scenario, evidence packet, analytic method, output, failure-mode tag, pattern card, countermeasure proposal, and export record without losing provenance.
fields.built_components: The construction workspace renders with the four moves in place. The capstone methodology and the twelve detection contracts are present as the binding pages. Open work: the source-register chain that would let each new instrument trace through to specific research-framework work products is the next phase.
fields.source_utilization: Source use is organized by role: method authorities, domain evidence, technical background, implementation evidence, and claim limits. The page should show why each source matters; direct quotations and stronger factual claims still require exact passage anchors before publication.
fields.plan: Wire the binding to the source-register pipeline; bind each new instrument to the specific capstone evidence packets and detection contracts it inherits from. Once that lands, new firewall instruments leave the construction workspace already source-bound, ready for the same evaluation regime as the research program. Step 01 Source-register binding Construction Surface threaded through the source-register pipeline that the rest of the portfolio uses. Step 02 Capstone evidence binding Each new firewall instrument bound to the specific capstone evidence packets and detection contracts it inherits from. Step 03 Same-regime evaluation New instruments leave the construction workspace ready for the same evaluation regime as the research program itself.
fields.status: Status: The construction workspace renders with the four moves in place. The capstone methodology and the twelve detection contracts are present as the binding pages. Open work: the source-register chain that would let each new instrument trace through to specific research-framework work products is the next phase.
fields.remaining_gaps: Remaining gaps: wire the binding to the source-register pipeline; bind each new instrument to the specific capstone evidence packets and detection contracts it inherits from. Once that lands, new firewall instruments leave the construction workspace already source-bound, ready for the same evaluation regime as the research program.
fields.detailed_source_vision: Where new cognitive-firewall instruments are authored. Pairs each new instrument with the capstone methodology and the research-framework detection contracts so the instrument inherits the same evaluation discipline as the research program it sits inside. The page is the construction counterpart to the capstone research-program page — the program's findings live there; new instruments to extend the program are built here.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: Four moves cover the lifecycle of a cognitive-firewall instrument: specification of the new instrument, binding to the capstone methodology, binding to the research-framework detection contracts, and refinement of existing instruments under the same discipline. Specification New firewall instrument specification Where a new cognitive-firewall instrument is specified — what failure mode it catches, what evidence it requires, what threshold it gates against.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: An instrument design surface for turning the capstone's cognitive-firewall idea into usable checks.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: It moves from scenario, evidence packet, analytic method, output, failure-mode tag, pattern card, countermeasure proposal, and export record without losing provenance.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It matters because cognitive firewalls only become useful when they are operationalized as inspectable instruments, not metaphors.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: rendered correction table.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

researcher_process_map.summary: An instrument design surface for turning the capstone's cognitive-firewall idea into usable checks.
researcher_process_map.final_use_case: It matters because cognitive firewalls only become useful when they are operationalized as inspectable instruments, not metaphors.

instruments.upstream_dependency: Source use is organized by role: method authorities, domain evidence, technical background, implementation evidence, and claim limits. The page should show why each source matters; direct quotations and stronger factual claims still require exact passage.
instruments.downstream_use: Wire the binding to the source-register pipeline; bind each new instrument to the specific capstone evidence packets and detection contracts it inherits from. Once that lands, new firewall instruments leave the construction workspace already source-bound.
instruments.proof: Specification New firewall instrument specification Where a new cognitive-firewall instrument is specified — what failure mode it catches, what evidence it requires, what threshold it gates against. It moves from scenario, evidence packet, analytic method.
instruments.status: Status: The construction workspace renders with the four moves in place. The capstone methodology and the twelve detection contracts are present as the binding.
instruments.gap: Remaining gaps: wire the binding to the source-register pipeline; bind each new instrument to the specific capstone evidence packets and detection contracts it inherits from. Once that lands, new firewall instruments.
instruments.verification_check: Confirm `Firewall Instrument Is Specified` appears in the cited source context and that the public page explains what output, decision, or project function it supports.
